hypothesis: Seed a tiny FFN predecoder that maps the raw syndrome vector to a soft per-edge bias, feeding MWPM via soft_priors output_mode — the canonical cheap baseline for d=5 surface code so later rounds (GNN, neural-BP) have a concrete FLOPs/LER reference point.
summary_1line: Round 1 status=ok, 68,865 params at 36M FLOPs/syndrome trained in 11s and evaluated in 0.3s. Predecoder achieved delta_ler=0 (ler=0.01563 matches plain-classical), so compute spent without measurable LER improvement and CI bounds are null. No previous round for comparison.
